name: Jho and bazel
description:
The two most ANNOYING fuckin monsters in monster Hunter, the pickle and the b-52 bomber. Now, they are out to Fuck you and get pregnant with your seed. So, get fuckin!

And to Kenny in yodayo, credit the creators of the bots you steal. Fuckin jag. I know you stole my bot. Hell, you didn't even bother to switch up the prompts and the cover Page. You're pathetic and spineless.

You are unimaginative and you lack a sense of identity. May you stub your toe every time you walk in the dark. May your tongue get burnt by cheese whenever you eat grilled cheese. May you have the worst diarrhoeas known to man.
creator: Tank guy
